description: Prepares an advisor for upcoming meetings by summarizing client information, fetching major life events, comparing goals, recent conversations, documents on file, and retrieving past interactions and notes.

target_questions.intent: Identify clients with unaddressed life events
target_questions.prompt: Which clients have had a major life event recently but no updated financial plan or scheduled review meeting?

target_questions.intent: Identify aging estate plans for wealthy older clients
target_questions.prompt: Which clients over 50 have estate planning documents that are more than 3 years old and have had significant balance growth or life changes since then?

target_questions.intent: Compare top clients across multiple dimensions
target_questions.prompt: Compare my top ten clients — their goals, recent conversations, portfolio positioning, documents on file, and any upcoming action items — so I can identify service gaps.
Give me a one-page prep for my meetings this week: key clients, large transactions since last review, open tasks, and recent interactions.
Summarize the last three advisor notes for the Smith household and any pending follow-ups.

target_questions.intent: Identify missing documents for upcoming meetings
target_questions.prompt: Which clients have incomplete or missing documents ahead of scheduled meetings?
Which clients haven't I received updated tax documents for yet?
What is the exact managed portfolio value for Katherine L. Davies, and what is her risk tolerance?
